q:
Select the option that correctly answers the question given below regarding the following sequence of numbers and symbols. (The counting is to be done only from left to right.)
(Sequence) 1 © % £ 8 8 @ % 4 # 1 © 3 7 6 3 % * & 9 7 (End)
How many such numbers are there in the above sequence, each of which is immediately preceded by a number and immediately followed by a symbol?
HR is related to KU in a certain way. In the same way, SK is related to VN. Following the same logic, EW is related to which of the following?

In the following series, on the same basis on which the second term has been derived from the first term, what should come in place of the question mark (?)?
UDB VEC WFD XGE ?
In a certain code language, 'lab bird set' is written as 'ef xo oj', and 'set web hall' is written as 'ot ef hs'. In that language, how will 'set' be coded?

If 'A' means '+', '-' means '×', 'B' means '÷' and 'C' means '-', then what will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following equation?
36 B 8 C 528 A 22 D 55 = ?

Select the option that correctly answers the question given below regarding the following sequence of numbers and symbols (all numbers are single-digit only). (The counting is to be done only from left to right.)
(Sequence) 7 8 9 4 6 7 3 9 6 1 9 8 3 4 (End)
How many such even numbers are there, each of which is immediately preceded by an odd number and immediately followed by an even number?

What will come in place of the question mark (?) in the given series?
532 542 550 556 560 ?

In the following question, the groups of letters in the question follow a certain rule to relate to the next group of letters. Select the option group of letters that follows the same rule.
OWES - WOES - OESW
LITE - ILTE - LTEI

What should come in place of the question mark (?) to logically complete the given series of numbers?
5 10 10 20 20 40 40 ?
In a certain code language, 'keep turning pages' is written as 'kd vt kg', and 'count the pages' is written as 'kd vt za'. In that language, how will 'pages' be coded?
P13 is related to SM in a certain way. In the same way, HA24 is related to KE28. Following the same logic, RK35 is related to which of the following?
In a class, Asha's rank is 17th from the top and 28th from the bottom. How many students are there in the class?

Given below are some statements followed by some conclusions. Considering the given statements to be true, even if they appear to deviate from commonly known facts, decide which of the given conclusions logically follow(s) from the statements.
Statements:
All camels are cars.
All cars are lights.
Conclusions:
(I) Some cars are lights.
(II) All lights are camels.

A, B, C, D, W, X and Y are sitting around a circular table facing the centre. C, B and D are sitting to the right of A. W is sitting to the left of A. X is sitting to the left of A, in the second position. D, B are at the first and third positions from the left. Who is sitting in the third position from the left, opposite to Y?

Based on the rule of the order of the English alphabet, which one of the following four letter-groups is NOT similar to the others? (Note: The differences/similarities are based on the positions of the letters in the alphabet, not on the number of consonants/vowels in a letter-group.)

Given below are some statements followed by some conclusions. Considering the given statements to be true, even if they appear to deviate from commonly known facts, decide which of the given conclusions logically follow(s) from the statements.
Statements:
All lions are leopards.
No leopard is a cow.
Conclusions:
(I): Some leopards are cows.
(II): No lion is a cow.

Look at the number sequence given below and answer the question that follows. (The counting is to be done only from left to right.) (Note: All numbers are single-digit only.)
(Sequence) 6 2 7 2 6 4 8 4 7 3 3 4 2 6 7 1 9 7 4 7 9 1 6 5 (End)
How many such numbers are there, each of which is immediately preceded by an even number and immediately followed by an odd number?

According to the Sustainable Development Goals - National Indicator Framework Progress Report 2025, what percentage of social security coverage do the certificates issued by the labour platform indicate, showing the country's progress in social security?
With which country's navy did India conduct its first joint special operations exercise named 'Tiger Claw' from 26 May to 10 September 2025?
Out of the total Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), for how many SDGs did India's score improve in June 2025?
How many beneficiaries did the GST Council exempt from health and life insurance policies on 22 September 2025?

GARBH-iNi-DRISHTI, launched in February 2025, is a Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI) initiative. It will provide real-time, integrated, evidence-based data for whom, in one place?
o: For ASHA workers, pregnant women and healthcare professionals
For pregnant women, the government and pharmacists
For doctors, nurses and AIDS patients
For HIV patients and other infected patients

q: Bansagar National Park, located in which state of India, was declared a National Park in the year 2025?
In March 2025, who won the title of 2025 Grandmaster (Master Solving) in the following?
On which date was the 56th meeting of the Monetary Policy Committee held?
Who was selected for the Indira Gandhi Prize for Peace, Disarmament and Development for the year 2024?
Which was the first team in the history of the Indian Premier League (IPL) to reach 150 wins, in April 2025?
In which country is the venue for the Third Conference of Landlocked Developing Countries (LLDCs) (2025) located?
The 2025 Kalinga Literary Festival's professor Sanjay Sinha award for translation of someone's stories was given to whom?
Which two organisations collaborated to develop the close quarter battle (CQB) carbine for the Indian Armed Forces?
Which country's parliament passed the (Amendment) Bill, 2025 recently?
When is World Environment Day 2025 being celebrated under the United Nations Environment Programme (UNEP)'s declared theme for 2025?
Mahendra Gurjar set a world record in 2025 by climbing the highest mountain of which country in the following?

Through the Health Data Software developed by which Union Ministry in the following did India initiate the Social Protection Data Pooling Exercise from phase 01 to provide welfare schemes integrated and connected to citizens at the central level?
Who took oath as the ninth Chief Minister of Delhi on the playground of Ramleela Maidan on 20 February 2025?
What will be the benefit to pregnant Anganwadi workers under the Poshan 2.0 related to the proposed Maternity Leave Reform System (PRMS) from April 2025?
o: All Anganwadi workers will get digital salary slips.
It will provide full maternity leave only on the birth of the first two children.
Pregnant women's children will be given private coaching free of cost.
Anganwadi workers will be monitored for actual time of attendance in school.

q: Which organisation usually supports the implementation of the 'Sports and Games for the Disabled' scheme?
o: Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports
